text_block_list.name: Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oho, do my eyes deceive me, or is that Lady Fine
before me!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! I believe the last time we saw each other
was back in Ireland, was it not?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This gentleman is a diplomat representing Ireland.
He was of no small assistance when I was
arranging my study abroad.

text_block_list.name: Gentleman
text_block_list.text:
I do believe us meeting here again has happened
for a reason. I'm actually holding a banquet at my
estate. I would be most honored to have you
attend.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much for extending an invitation.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
However, I am afraid the decision is not mine to
make.

text_block_list.name: Gentleman
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I see.
You are her trainer, correct? What say you?

text_block_list.name: Gentleman
text_block_list.text:
It's a rather casual occasion. There's no dress
code. You're both very welcome, assuming you've
the time to spare.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Honestly, I'm nervous. Considering how
disastrous things have been so far today, I can't
help feeling anxious that I might embarrass Fine
Motion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But then, I'm not just anybody—I'm her trainer.
And as her trainer, my desire to support her is
even more intense than that anxiety!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, let's.
Well then, perhaps you could lead the way?

text_block_list.name: Lady
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, if it isn't Lady Fine! It has been some
time since our last meeting, hasn't it? I see that
you've grown into a wonderful young lady.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. And if I may, you remain as ebullient
as ever yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I knew she had it in her, but the sheer nobility she
exudes when the occasion calls for it leaves me
speechless. I can't help feeling painfully out of
place in comparison.

text_block_list.name: Guest
text_block_list.text: I hear that you're Lady Fine's trainer. Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Guest
text_block_list.text:
I've been wanting very much to speak with you. I
wonder, considering her results thus far, what
manner of strategy the two of you intend to
implement moving forward?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I won't blow it this time! It's time for me to step
up as Fine Motion's trainer!

text_block_list.name: Guest
text_block_list.text:
I see. I wasn't aware of such training methods! My
niece is an Umamusume, you see. She just loves
to run. Would you mind if I utilized some of those
training techniques with her?

text_block_list.name: Guest
text_block_list.text:
This has been extraordinarily illuminating. I very
much look forward to speaking with you again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I somehow survive the conversation and slip away
for a break with Fine Motion when an opportunity
presents itself.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Quite an evening, wouldn't y—oh my. You seem
way more stressed than I was expecting.
choice_data_list: I wanted to support you properly this time...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And you have! You've been just splendid, if you
ask me. Actually, I've been subject to some praise
myself.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Still... it's not our success at the party that I'm
most happy about. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What's made me happiest is how hard you've
been trying on my behalf.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You diligently gathered all those clues during the
mystery game so I'd have a great time, and then
you helped me solve the mystery as well...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And you took charge to make everything as fun
as possible so I'd make plenty of lovely memories!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You were always there by my side, trying your
very best. Given that you're such a hard worker,
you might deny it, but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You cannot deny this pounding in my chest.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm so proud... both of you as my
trainer, and the fact that I get to work alongside
such an amazing person!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Will you continue to travel down this path with
me?
choice_data_list: Y-yeah! And I'm gonna work extra hard!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I thought you'd say that. And that's what makes you you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Or something like that! ♪

text_block_list.name: Guest
text_block_list.text:
Lady Fine, I wonder if I might trouble your trainer
for some further conversation?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Let's! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head back to into the crowd side-by-side. I
make the conscious decision that this is where I'm
going to be from now on—walking directly by her
side.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh! ...Hehe. So that's how you're playing it, huh?
Very well.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I hereby acknowledge your spirited intentions... I
would very much like to extend my gratitude as
well.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Even if I were to return to my home far, far away,
the magnificent memories I have made here in
Japan would remain in my heart. Your
contribution to those memories has been
indispensable.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I expect great things from you... my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stands perfectly straight as she addresses me
in her noble tone. I'd better do my very best to
ensure all her days are bright.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With resolve in my heart, I bow respectfully to my
trainee.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Talk about gung ho! Don't go overboa—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Although... I suppose pushing past our limits will force us into new experiences... Don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: At least, it has so far!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh. I wonder what sort of unreasonable
requests I should make...
choice_data_list: Ooh... Please go easy on me!
Ooh... Please go easy on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The words slip out and Fine Motion's smile grows
wider. I see a kindness in her expression, though,
and rest easy.
